meta.title: Xilofon Digital | Website Design for Small Businesses
meta.description: Professional website creation at a fixed €188/year. SEO-friendly pages, Facebook ad management, Google Business and SEO consulting.

hero.title: Professional website
hero.subtitle: We build SEO-friendly websites for freelancers and small businesses. One fixed annual fee – domain, hosting and yearly maintenance all included.

HomePage.servicesSubtitle: Everything a small business needs to build a strong online presence.

web.title: Website creation
web.desc: A custom, SEO-friendly one-page website we build with care. The annual fee covers domain, hosting and one yearly review and refresh.

social.title: Facebook campaigns & ads

gbp.title: Google Business Profile

seo.title: SEO consulting

HomePage.pricingSubtitle: One package, one price. No hidden fees.
HomePage.stepsSubtitle: Three simple steps and your site is live.
HomePage.step1Desc: Send a short message – tell us what you do and what you want to achieve.
HomePage.step2Desc: We take care of everything: design, copy, domain, hosting – all included.
HomePage.step3Desc: Your site goes live, Google finds it, and clients start finding your business.
HomePage.t1Text: I used to rely only on Facebook. Now new clients come through my website, and I get more bookings every month.
HomePage.t2Text: Two weeks after launch I was already on the first page of Google. What you get for €188 is truly remarkable.
HomePage.t3Text: I was afraid of digital marketing. The team guided me through everything, and now I have a professional website that actually brings clients.
HomePage.contactSubtitle: Tell us about your business – we'll get back to you within 1-2 business days.

meta.title: Website quote request | Xilofon Digital
meta.description: Get a free quote! Modern website for freelancers and small businesses. Fixed €188/year.

LandingPage.title: Get a professional website
LandingPage.subtitle: We build SEO-friendly websites for freelancers and small businesses. One message, and your site is live within 1-2 weeks.

meta.title: Services
meta.description: Website creation at €188/year, Facebook ad campaign management, Google Business Profile setup and SEO consulting.

ServicesPage.heroSubtitle: Our services are designed for small businesses and freelancers – straightforward and transparently priced.
ServicesPage.ctaTitle: Not sure which service you need? Ask us!
ServicesPage.ctaSubtitle: Even a short question helps us understand what will actually make a difference for you.

web.title: Website creation
web.desc: We build a custom, SEO-friendly one-page website from scratch – design, copy, domain and hosting all included. The annual fee covers domain renewal, hosting and one yearly review and refresh. Any additional requests beyond this scope – such as new sections or design changes – are charged separately.

social.title: Facebook campaigns & ad management
social.desc: Facebook Ads is the most effective way to reach exactly the people who would buy your service. We manage your campaigns end-to-end – from audience research to monthly reporting – so you can focus on your clients.

gbp.title: Google Business Profile setup
gbp.tagline: Put your business on Google Maps.
gbp.desc: When someone nearby searches for a service like yours, you want to be the first result they see. We set up and optimize your Google Business Profile: photos, description, services, hours – everything that matters.

seo.title: SEO consulting
seo.desc: SEO is a long-term investment: do it right once, and it keeps delivering. We do keyword research, technical audits, and give you a clear action plan.

meta.title: About us
meta.description: We understand your business and offer tailored online solutions. Our team helps freelancers and small businesses build their online presence.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: We know how hard it is to build an online presence when you're running a business solo. We make that easy.
AboutPage.storyP1: We've spoken with many freelancers and small business owners who had great services but couldn't attract clients online. Some tried expensive agencies and got nothing for their money.
AboutPage.storyP2: Xilofon was created to change that. We build websites that actually work – that show up on Google, build trust, and bring clients.
AboutPage.storyP3: All at a fixed, transparent price – because we believe a good website isn't a luxury, it's a necessity for every business.
AboutPage.valuesSubtitle: These guide us with every client.
AboutPage.val1Desc: Our goal isn't just a beautiful site – it's a site that actually brings you clients.
AboutPage.val2Desc: We know not everyone is a tech expert. That's why we guide you through every step and explain everything.
AboutPage.val3Desc: Fixed price, simple process, transparent communication. No unnecessary complications.
AboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what you do – and we'll figure out how we can help.
